ScriptLine: 'Store the modified flag for the Lot field because this changes in StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
'If the vendor is in a different currency, convert back to domestic prior to job matl issue.
'Restore the modified flag for the Lot field because this changed in StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
' For this form, in FIP first must validate that the user at least specified
' a vendor number or name, and a status.
' If GrnReceipt is selected, they must also specify a grn num
' The filter criteria then needs to be custom created.  See CreateCustomFilter())
' verify that Vendnum is unique (See ValidatePoVendNumUnique())
'Clear the GrnValid and GrnExists Variables before processing
' Need to validate that if GrnNum entered,
' validate that number either doesn't exist at all,
' or exists with status of I and Whse = CurWhse
' If the GrnNum is a valid num but with the wrong stat or whse,
' the component validation will set variable GRNValid = -1
' In this case, return to Filter in Place.
' The variables referenced are set by the validators on GrnNum
ValidateFIPCriteria = 0 'Continuing so that the user is not trapped in FIP
